title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI's favorite second act | TechCrunch
summary: Databricks on Thursday announced a new round of funding that values the company at $188 billion . Only five months ago, in February, Databricks closed a $5 billion Series L raise at a $134 billion valuation .
